screen.huntercraft.phone.title: TONPA JOB BOARD
screen.huntercraft.phone.subtitle: Tonpa's phone lists roaming work around the region.
screen.huntercraft.phone.note: Quest rewards usually land between 300 and 2000 XP depending on risk.
screen.huntercraft.phone.active_subtitle: Current jobs with their live objectives and progress.
screen.huntercraft.phone.active_note: Location info only appears where this system currently tracks it.
screen.huntercraft.phone.active_empty.de: Accept a job from the Jobs tab and it will appear here with its target and progress.
screen.huntercraft.phone.location.none: Location: no location tracker for this quest yet
quest.huntercraft.zombie_hunt.desc: Defeat 5 zombies to prove your close-combat control.
quest.huntercraft.iron_supply.desc: Retrieve 3 iron ingots for a field equipment check.
quest.huntercraft.phone.pig_hunting.desc: Hunt down a full pack of Great Stamp Pigs before they overrun the area.
Forge a requested weapon for a client and get paid for the craftsmanship.
quest.huntercraft.phone.item_retrieval.d: Track down a requested item and recover it for the job board contact.
quest.huntercraft.phone.item_delivery.de: Gather a requested item and make the delivery safely to the client.
quest.huntercraft.phone.bandit_beating.d: A hostile bandit group is camped out nearby. Go wipe them out.
quest.huntercraft.phone.package_pickup.d: Recover a package stashed in a random chest. Expect guards on the approach.
passive.huntercraft.speed.step_drive.des: At 5 Speed points, movement abilities gain 10% more speed and distance.
passive.huntercraft.speed.flash_accel.de: At 30 Speed points, movement abilities gain an additional 50% speed bonus.
passive.huntercraft.defense.iron_guard.d: At 5 Defense points, guard damage reduction falls off by only 5% per second instead of 20%.
passive.huntercraft.defense.perfect_read: At 30 Defense points, the guard parry window increases from 0.5 seconds to 0.75 seconds.
passive.huntercraft.boxing.slip_guard.de: At 5 Boxing points, you gain a 30% chance to dodge direct melee hits.
passive.huntercraft.boxing.breaker_fists: At 30 Boxing points, the guard parry window increases from 0.5 seconds to 0.6 seconds.
passive.huntercraft.martial_arts.flow_st: At 5 Martial Arts points, movement abilities gain 15% more speed and distance.
At 35 Martial Arts points, stun time is reduced by 25%.
message.huntercraft.level_up: NenUnbound level up! You are now level %s.
message.huntercraft.tonpa.offer: Tonpa: 1 emerald gets you a phone.
message.huntercraft.tonpa.sold_phone: Tonpa sold you a phone for 1 emerald.
message.huntercraft.tonpa.has_phone: Tonpa: You already have a phone. Use it to check jobs.
message.huntercraft.phone.only_one: You can only have one phone quest active at a time.
message.huntercraft.phone.location_set: Quest site marked at X %s, Y %s, Z %s.
message.huntercraft.phone.refreshing: Phone quests are refreshing. Try again in about %s seconds.
message.huntercraft.node_cannot_remove: There are no points to remove from that style.
message.huntercraft.category_locked: You are locked into the %s category.
death.attack.huntercraft.weapon: %1$s was cut down by a Hunter weapon attack.
death.attack.huntercraft.physical: %1$s was crushed by a Hunter physical attack.
